notes: CBE 1.1 (Governance Framework) and 2.1 (Risk Identification) partially address organizational context analysis. No direct PCI DSS equivalent exists for ISMS context determination.
CBE 1.1 (Governance) and 2.4 (Third-Party Risk) partially address stakeholder requirements. PCI DSS does not cover the broader interested-party concept.
CBE 1.1 and 1.3 define governance and policy boundaries. PCI DSS scope is limited to the cardholder data environment, not the broader ISMS scope.
